# Test apx catalog show command
#
# This scenario verifies `apx catalog show <api-id>` displays full identity
# and catalog data, with graceful degradation when no catalog exists.

# Setup: Create a test canonical repo with an apx.yaml config
mkdir canonical
cd canonical
exec git init
exec git config user.email 'test@test.com'
exec git config user.name 'Test'
exec apx init canonical --org=testorg --repo=apis --skip-git --non-interactive

# Create apx.yaml with org/repo so source-repo can be resolved
exec sh -c 'echo "version: 1" > apx.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "org: testorg" >> apx.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "repo: apis" >> apx.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "module_roots:" >> apx.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "  - proto" >> apx.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "  - openapi" >> apx.yaml'

# Remove the default catalog so Test 1 starts clean
exec sh -c 'rm -f catalog/catalog.yaml'

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Test 1: Show without catalog — derived fields only
# --------------------------------------------------------
exec apx catalog show proto/payments/ledger/v1
stdout 'API:.*proto/payments/ledger/v1'
stdout 'Format:.*proto'
stdout 'Domain:.*payments'
stdout 'Name:.*ledger'
stdout 'Line:.*v1'
stdout 'Go module:.*github.com/testorg/apis/proto/payments/ledger'
stdout 'Go import:.*github.com/testorg/apis/proto/payments/ledger/v1'
stdout 'Latest stable:.*none'
stdout 'No catalog data found'

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Test 2: Show with catalog data
# --------------------------------------------------------

# Write a catalog with identity-enriched entries
exec sh -c 'mkdir -p catalog'
exec sh -c 'echo "version: 1" > catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "org: testorg" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "repo: apis" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "modules:" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "  - id: proto/payments/ledger/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    name: proto/payments/ledger/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    format: proto" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    domain: payments" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    api_line: v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    description: Payment ledger API" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    version: v1.2.3" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    latest_stable: v1.2.3" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    latest_prerelease: v1.3.0-beta.1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    lifecycle: stable" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    path: proto/payments/ledger/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    owners:" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "      - \"@platform/payments\"" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "  - id: openapi/iam/roles/v2" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    name: openapi/iam/roles/v2" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    format: openapi" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    domain: iam" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    api_line: v2" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    description: IAM roles API" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    version: v2.0.0-alpha.3" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    latest_prerelease: v2.0.0-alpha.3" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    lifecycle: experimental" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    path: openapi/iam/roles/v2" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'

# Show stable API with catalog data
exec apx catalog show proto/payments/ledger/v1
stdout 'API:.*proto/payments/ledger/v1'
stdout 'Lifecycle:.*stable'
stdout 'Latest stable:.*v1.2.3'
stdout 'Latest prerelease:.*v1.3.0-beta.1'
stdout 'Owners:.*@platform/payments'
! stdout 'No catalog data found'

# Show prerelease-only API
exec apx catalog show openapi/iam/roles/v2
stdout 'API:.*openapi/iam/roles/v2'
stdout 'Lifecycle:.*experimental'
stdout 'Latest stable:.*none'
stdout 'Latest prerelease:.*v2.0.0-alpha.3'

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Test 3: Show with v2+ API — verify Go module path includes /v2
# --------------------------------------------------------
exec apx catalog show openapi/iam/roles/v2
stdout 'Go module:.*github.com/testorg/apis/openapi/iam/roles/v2'
stdout 'Go import:.*github.com/testorg/apis/openapi/iam/roles/v2'

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Test 4: JSON output
# --------------------------------------------------------
exec apx --json catalog show proto/payments/ledger/v1
stdout '"id": "proto/payments/ledger/v1"'
stdout '"format": "proto"'
stdout '"domain": "payments"'
stdout '"latest_stable": "v1.2.3"'
stdout '"tag_pattern": "proto/payments/ledger/v1/v\*"'

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Test 5: Invalid API ID
# --------------------------------------------------------
! exec apx catalog show not-an-api-id
stderr 'invalid API ID'

! exec apx catalog show grpc/payments/ledger/v1
stderr 'invalid API format'

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Test 6: Custom source-repo flag
# --------------------------------------------------------
exec apx catalog show --source-repo github.com/acme/schemas proto/payments/ledger/v1
stdout 'Go module:.*github.com/acme/schemas/proto/payments/ledger'
stdout 'Source:.*github.com/acme/schemas'
